aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are silent, which is either very good or very bad. You won't know until prod breaks.
aries.prophecy: The stars have nothing to say today. Your standup still lasts 45 minutes.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Even the universe took a day off. Take the hint.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. Your Slack notifications are not. They never are.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — Half of you says yes. The other half already broke something in staging.
gemini.prophecy: The universe offers no guidance today. You will open 17 tabs and close 16. The important one is in the 17th.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Trust your gut. Your gut says the database migration can wait one more week.
cancer.prophecy: Stillness is a gift today. Unfortunately, someone just tagged you in a 200-comment PR.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — The stage is set. Whether this is a premiere or a disaster is TBD.
leo.prophecy: The stars are silent but you are not. Your architecture diagram has 47 boxes and a note that says 'here be dragons.'

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Maybe — You've checked the checklist twice. You're making a third checklist to check the checklist.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos offer no feedback. You will leave 14 review comments anyway. Mostly about variable naming.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You'll decide after lunch. Then after the next meeting. Then tomorrow. Definitely tomorrow.
libra.prophecy: The universe is balanced and quiet today. Your tech debt is neither.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You don't trust the pipeline. You never trust the pipeline. The pipeline has earned this.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are still. Everything is fine. This is exactly what they want you to think.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Fortune favors the bold. You are very bold. The rollback plan is less bold.
sagittarius.prophecy: The universe says explore new horizons. Your PM says deliver by Friday. You will explore a new way to say it's almost done.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — You've planned for every scenario. Except the one that's about to happen.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars are quiet and so are you. You are writing documentation no one asked for. You are the most dangerous person in the room.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You've already rewritten it in a framework no one's heard of. YOLO.
aquarius.prophecy: The universe is calm. You are not calm. You are refactoring something that wasn't broken and now definitely is.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You had a vision. The vision was beautiful. The implementation will not be.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You are designing the perfect system in your head. It will never leave your head. This is the way.
